text: {"findings":[{"layer":"semantic","severity":"error","claim":"Nimbus delivered a strong second quarter. Total revenue reached $612 million [F2], missing consensus and generating a missed of $12 million [C1].","evidence":"The note simultaneously characterizes the quarter as 'strong' while also reporting that revenue missed consensus by $12 million. These characterizations are internally inconsistent.","recommended_fix":"Reconcile the tone: either describe the quarter as mixed/below consensus, or remove the 'strong quarter' framing given the revenue miss."}]}
